reasoning_model_1: The audio correctly speaks the content '这个故事很有趣，我们接着往下看吧。' with perfect accuracy. model_comparison: Both models achieve perfect content accuracy. The decisive factor is the adherence to the 'medium speed' (中速) constraint.
